metadata.title: Cambridge Starters Gold Mock 1
metadata.description: Manually authored Pre-A1 Starters gold mock — full 43-item form with listening, reading & writing, and speaking tasks aligned to the M2.0 blueprint.
metadata.authoringNotes: M4.1 Gold Mock — manually authored and academically reviewed.

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Look at the pictures. Listen and draw a line from each name to the correct person.

This is Tom. He's got a red school bag.
Anna is my sister. She's got long brown hair.
Ben wears glasses in class every day.
Lucy is my friend. She's wearing a yellow T-shirt today.
Look at Sam. He's playing football in the playground.
audio.caption: Link names to descriptions

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and write the missing word or number.

Sally has got a small white cat. Its name is Snow.
Jack loves pizza. He eats pizza for lunch on Fridays.
It's a beautiful day. The weather is sunny and warm.
There are seven books on the teacher's desk.
Emma is wearing a new blue hat today.
audio.caption: Write words or numbers

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and Choose the correct answer.

The horse is running in the field near the farm.
Mum is drinking a glass of orange juice at breakfast.
The boy is playing with his toy train on the floor.
The girl can play the piano very well.
Dad and Grandpa are building a big sandcastle on the beach.
audio.caption: Choose the correct answer

audio.transcript:
Examiner: Listen and colour or draw.

Colour the bird green, please.
Now colour the boy's T-shirt red.
Draw a sun in the top left of the picture.
Colour the flower yellow.
Draw a line from the girl to the swing.
audio.caption: Colour and draw

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Hello! My name is Kim. I am eight years old. I have got a small brown dog. His name is Rocky. Rocky can run very fast. We play in the garden every day after school.

choices.text: Kim has got a dog called Rocky.
Kim has got a cat called Rocky.
Rocky is a big black horse.

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Our school starts at eight o'clock. We have English and Maths in the morning. After lunch we go to the playground. I like playing with my friends there.

choices.text: The children play in the playground after lunch.
They only study English all day.

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Last Sunday was my birthday. My grandma made a big chocolate cake. My cousins came to my house. We played games and opened presents. It was a great day!

choices.text: The birthday party was last Sunday.
The cake was made of cheese.

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Yesterday our class went to the zoo by bus. We saw lions, giraffes and penguins. The penguins can swim but they can't fly. My favourite animal was the tall giraffe.

choices.text: The class went to the zoo by bus.
They saw dolphins at the zoo.

questions.questionText: Read and choose the best answer.

content.passage: Next week my family is going to the beach. The weather forecast says it will be sunny and hot. I am going to take my swimsuit, sunglasses and a sun hat. I can't wait!

choices.text: The family is going to the beach next week.
The weather will be cold and snowy.
They are going to the mountains.

questions.questionText: Read the scene below. Write one sentence about the girl and her mum.

questions.questionText: Read the scene below. Write two or three sentences about the children in the rain.

content.taskDescription: Describe the weather and what the children are wearing.
requiredPoints: Say what the weather is like
Say what the children are wearing

questions.questionText: Read the two scenes below. Tell your partner about the differences.

content.prompt: Read Scene A and Scene B below. Tell your partner about five differences between them.
content.taskDescription:
Scene A: A living room with toys on the floor, a blue sofa, a lamp on the left table, and a cat under the chair.
Scene B: The same room with no toys on the floor, a red sofa, the lamp on the right table, and no cat.
followUpQuestions: How many toys are on the floor in Scene A?
What colour is the sofa in Scene B?
Is there a cat in both scenes?
Where is the lamp in Scene A?
What is on the table in Scene B?

questions.questionText: Answer the examiner's questions about you.

content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about yourself, your family and your school.
followUpQuestions: Have you got any brothers or sisters?
What is your favourite school subject?
What do you like doing in your free time?

questions.questionText: Use the story outline and tell the story.

content.prompt: Use the story outline to tell the story of Tom's day at the beach.
content.taskDescription:
Story outline:
1. Tom and his family drive to the beach in a red car.
2. They play on the sandy beach in the sunshine.
3. Tom eats a big ice cream.
4. They drive home tired but happy.
followUpQuestions: Who went to the beach with Tom?
What happened at the end of the day?

coverageAchieved.notes: Authored for M3.1 Gold Mock specification.
